title: Snap Inc. Analyst Ratings and Estimates
text:
Snap Inc. Analyst Ratings and Estimates

Consensus Rating and Price Target

The 25 analysts that cover Snap Inc. stock have a consensus rating of Hold and an average price target of $8.41, which forecasts a 44.01% increase in the stock price over the next year. The lowest target is $5.25 and the highest is $15.

Analyst Sentiment Distribution

13% of analysts recommend a Strong Buy, 4% recommend Buy, 79% suggest Holding, 4% advise Selling, and 0% predict a Strong Sell.

Revenue and Earnings Forecasts

The most recent consensus for Snap from 40 analysts is for revenues of US$6.70b in 2026, which would imply a meaningful 9.8% increase on its revenue over the past 12 months. Snap is forecast to grow earnings and revenue by 65% and 8.6% per annum respectively, with EPS expected to grow by 67.1% per annum.

Profitability Outlook

The loss per share is expected to greatly reduce in the near future, narrowing 57% to US$0.11. Analysts modestly lowered Snap's price target to $9.28, reflecting revenue and EBITDA misses from Q2 amid mixed ad market dynamics and competitive pressures, partially offset by strong user growth and optimism around a more favorable macro backdrop.
